title: Salesforce AppExchange Intelligence Engine — Input

sphere.title: Sphere (label)
sphere.description: Label stored in output for grouping. If empty, Actor will default it to categoryGroup.

categoryPreset.title: Category preset (label)
categoryPreset.description: Preset labels to run. The Actor resolves crawl targets from taxonomy.json (recommended). Example: ["sales"] or ["automotive"] or ["b2b-commerce"].

appGroup.title: App group(s) to crawl (optional override)
appGroup.description:
Optional override. If provided, the Actor crawls exactly these Explore filter values.
Examples: business-needs → ["contract management"]; industries → ["agriculture & mining"]; products → ["B2B Commerce"].

maxPages.title: Max scroll passes per app group
maxPages.description: How many scroll/scan passes to perform when collecting listing links.

pricingFilter.title: Pricing filter (optional)
pricingFilter.description: Optional. Filter by inferred price bucket. Empty disables filtering.

minRating.title: Minimum rating (optional)
minRating.description: Filter out apps below this rating. 0 disables rating filter.

headless.title: Headless browser
headless.description: Run browser headless (recommended true on Apify). For debugging, set false.

proxySettings.title: Proxy configuration
proxySettings.description: Apify proxy settings (recommended for AppExchange reliability).

analysisOptions.title: Market intelligence outputs
analysisOptions.description: Control MARKET_INTELLIGENCE.json, EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.txt and MARKET_REPORT.pdf creation.

enableCompetitiveAnalysis.title: Competitive analysis
enableCompetitiveAnalysis.description: Include competitive analysis section in MARKET_INTELLIGENCE.json.

enableCustomerAnalysis.title: Customer analysis
enableCustomerAnalysis.description: Include customer signals analysis section in MARKET_INTELLIGENCE.json.

enableMarketTrends.title: Market trends
enableMarketTrends.description: Include market trends section in MARKET_INTELLIGENCE.json.

enableExecutiveSummary.title: Executive summary
enableExecutiveSummary.description: Generate EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.txt based on the market intelligence output.

outputJsonReport.title: Write JSON report
outputJsonReport.description: If enabled, save MARKET_INTELLIGENCE.json to the Key-Value store.

outputPdfReport.title: Write PDF report
outputPdfReport.description: If enabled, save MARKET_REPORT.pdf to the Key-Value store.

reportKvKeyPrefix.title: KV key prefix (optional)
reportKvKeyPrefix.description: Optional prefix for KV output keys (e.g. 'ERP_' → ERP_MARKET_REPORT.pdf).
